'''pajosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:crackpottedness|crackpottedness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-j-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:crackpottedness|crackpottedness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| pajosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæjesheth|pæjesheth]] || [[word:pæjeshej|pæjeshej]] || [[word:pæjeshesh|pæjeshesh]] || [[word:pæjeshe|pæjeshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pajojoshoth|pajojoshoth]] || [[word:pajojoshoj|pajojoshoj]] || [[word:pajojoshosh|pajojoshosh]] || [[word:pajojosho|pajojosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pajoshoth|pajoshoth]] || [[word:pajoshoj|pajoshoj]] || [[word:pajoshosh|pajoshosh]] || [[word:pajosho|pajosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pajofshoth|pajofshoth]] || [[word:pajofshoj|pajofshoj]] || [[word:pajofshosh|pajofshosh]] || [[word:pajofshof|pajofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pajoshotho|pajoshotho]] || [[word:pajoshojo|pajoshojo]] || [[word:pajoshosho|pajoshosho]] || [[word:pajoshoko|pajoshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pajoshoth|pajoshoth]] || [[word:pajoshoj|pajoshoj]] || [[word:pajoshosh|pajoshosh]] || [[word:pajosho|pajosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pajoshothol|pajoshothol]] || [[word:pajoshojol|pajoshojol]] || [[word:pajoshoshol|pajoshoshol]] || [[word:pajoshokol|pajoshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pajoshothotho|pajoshothotho]] || [[word:pajoshojojo|pajoshojojo]] || [[word:pajoshoshosho|pajoshoshosho]] || [[word:pajoshoko|pajoshoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pajoshothon|pajoshothon]] || [[word:pajoshojon|pajoshojon]] || [[word:pajoshoshon|pajoshoshon]] || [[word:pajoshokon|pajoshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pajoshothoro|pajoshothoro]] || [[word:pajoshojoro|pajoshojoro]] || [[word:pajoshoshoro|pajoshoshoro]] || [[word:pajoshokoro|pajoshokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
